title: Vežba 51

questions.text: Obavesti svog menadžmenta o novom rasporedu kancelarije. Koja rečenica tačno opisuje lokaciju odeljenja ili sobe?

answers.answer: The break room is between the IT department and the kitchen.
The meeting room is between of the lobby and the copy area.
answers.feedback: Between of nije tačna izjava. Trebalo bi da bude between the lobby and the copy area samo.

answers.answer: Reception is between the sales team with the HR office.
answers.feedback: Trebalo bi da koristiš between ... and ..., a ne between ... with ...

answers.answer: The server room is in between to the hallway and the printer area.
answers.feedback: Trebalo bi da bude between the hallway and the printer area bez to.

instructions: Ovaj zadatak nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation:
Between ... and ... koristi se za opisivanje lokacije koja je između dve određene zone.

Ispravna rečenica prati ovu strukturu: between the IT department and the kitchen.

Ostali izbori pogrešno koriste veznike ili afiksi, čime ih čine negramatične.
